name: greenhouse
description: Access Greenhouse recruiting data — jobs, candidates, and applications — via the Harvest API, and add candidate notes

envVars.name: GREENHOUSE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Greenhouse Harvest API key (used as the HTTP Basic username; the password is blank). Created in the Dev Center under API Credential Management

envVars.name: GREENHOUSE_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: Leave empty — Greenhouse Harvest Basic auth uses the API key as username with a blank password

tools.name: List Jobs
tools.description: List jobs in the Greenhouse organization with optional status and date filtering

status.description: Filter by job status: open, closed, or draft

per_page.description: Number of jobs to return per page (1-500)

created_after.description: Only jobs created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

updated_after.description: Only jobs updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

tools.name: List Candidates
tools.description: List candidates with optional job, email, and date filtering

job_id.description: Only return candidates with an application on this job

email.description: Only return candidates with this email address

per_page.description: Number of candidates to return per page (1-500)

created_after.description: Only candidates created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

updated_after.description: Only candidates updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

tools.name: Get Candidate
tools.description: Get a candidate's full record, including applications, attachments, and contact details

tools.name: List Applications
tools.description: List applications with optional job, status, and activity filtering

job_id.description: Only return applications for this job

status.description: Filter by application status: active, converted, hired, or rejected

per_page.description: Number of applications to return per page (1-500)

created_after.description: Only applications created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

last_activity_after.description: Only applications whose last activity was at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List Greenhouse users to find the numeric user IDs needed for On-Behalf-Of headers and notes

per_page.description: Number of users to return per page (1-500)

updated_after.description: Only users updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

tools.name: List Job Stages
tools.description: List the interview stages of a job to find the stage IDs needed to move applications

per_page.description: Number of stages to return per page (1-500)

tools.name: Move Application
tools.description: Move an active application to another stage on the same job (the core pipeline action)

On-Behalf-Of.description: ID of the Greenhouse user issuing this request — required by Greenhouse for auditing all writes

from_stage_id.description: ID of the stage the application is currently in

to_stage_id.description: ID of the stage to move the application to (see List Job Stages)

tools.name: Add Candidate Note
tools.description: Create a note on a candidate's activity feed (requires the acting Greenhouse user's ID)

On-Behalf-Of.description: ID of the Greenhouse user issuing this request — required by Greenhouse for auditing all writes

user_id.description: The ID of the Greenhouse user creating the note

visibility.description: Note visibility: admin_only, private, or public

prompts.title: Hiring pipeline overview
prompts.prompt: List my open jobs in Greenhouse and summarize active applications per job.

prompts.title: Recent candidates
prompts.prompt: Show me candidates added to Greenhouse in the last week with their current application status.

prompts.title: Note on a candidate
prompts.prompt: Look up a candidate I specify in Greenhouse and add a note to their activity feed with my feedback.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Greenhouse Harvest API setup

steps.title: Get Greenhouse access
steps.description: You need a Greenhouse Recruiting account; ask your Greenhouse admin for access or request a demo/sandbox at https://www.greenhouse.com. Creating API keys requires the 'Can manage ALL organization's API Credentials' developer permission.

steps.title: Create a Harvest API key
steps.description: In Greenhouse, go to Configure (gear icon) → Dev Center → API Credential Management → Create New API Key, choose type 'Harvest', and grant only the endpoints you need (Jobs, Candidates, Applications).

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add GREENHOUSE_API_KEY=<your key> to your .env file and leave GREENHOUSE_API_PASSWORD empty. The Harvest API uses HTTP Basic auth with the key as username and a blank password.

steps.title: Find your user ID for writes
steps.description: Write requests must include an On-Behalf-Of header with the numeric ID of the Greenhouse user performing the action (look it up via the Harvest Users endpoint or the Greenhouse UI).

notes: Each API key is restricted to the endpoints granted at creation — a 403 usually means the key lacks that endpoint
All write endpoints (POST/PATCH/DELETE) require the On-Behalf-Of header for auditing
List endpoints return plain JSON arrays and paginate via per_page/page with RFC 5988 Link response headers
